mapper.select: SELECT f.file_id, MIN(uf.user_id) AS user_id FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON uf.file_id = f.file_id AND uf.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN video_meta_data vm ON vm.file_id = f.file_id LEFT JOIN async_task task ON task.task_key = CONCAT(#{taskType}, ':', f.file_id, ':', #{taskVersion}) WHERE f.category = 'video' AND COALESCE(f.status, 'READY') NOT IN ('FAILED', 'DELETING') AND ( f.thumbnail_object_name IS NULL OR f.thumbnail_object_name = '' OR vm.file_id IS NULL ) AND task.id IS NULL GROUP BY f.file_id ORDER BY f.file_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.file_id, MIN(uf.user_id) AS user_id FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON uf.file_id = f.file_id AND uf.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN async_task task ON task.task_type = #{taskType} AND task.file_id = f.file_id AND task.task_key LIKE CONCAT( #{taskType}, ':', f.file_id, ':', #{taskVersion}, ':%' ) WHERE f.latitude IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(f.status, 'READY') NOT IN ('FAILED', 'DELETING') AND f.longitude IS NOT NULL AND f.latitude BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND f.longitude BETWEEN -180 AND 180 AND (f.location IS NULL OR f.location = '' OR f.location = '解析中') AND task.id IS NULL GROUP BY f.file_id ORDER BY f.file_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.file_id, MIN(uf.user_id) AS user_id FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON uf.file_id = f.file_id AND uf.is_deleted = 0 WHERE f.category = 'image' AND COALESCE(f.status, 'READY') NOT IN ('FAILED', 'DELETING') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM picture_tag pt WHERE pt.file_id = f.file_id ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM async_task task WHERE task.task_type = #{taskType} AND task.file_id = f.file_id AND task.task_key LIKE CONCAT( #{taskType}, ':', f.file_id, ':%:', #{taskVersion}, ':auto' ) ) GROUP BY f.file_id ORDER BY f.file_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT distinct file.* FROM file JOIN user_file uf on file.file_id = uf.file_id LEFT JOIN video_meta_data ON file.file_id = video_meta_data.file_id where uf.user_id = #{userId} and uf.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY file.date_time_original DESC limit ${size}

SELECT similar_id, file.*, video_meta_data.duration AS duration FROM file JOIN user_file uf ON file.file_id = uf.file_id JOIN similar_picture sp ON file.file_id = sp.file_id LEFT JOIN video_meta_data ON file.file_id = video_meta_data.file_id
uf.is_deleted = 0 AND sp.user_id = #{userId}
AND file.category = 'image' AND file.content_type != 'image/gif'
AND file.content_type = 'image/gif'
AND file.category = 'video'
GROUP BY similar_id, file.file_id,sp.user_id

SELECT file.*, DATE(${orderKeyword}) AS group_date, video_meta_data.duration AS duration FROM file INNER JOIN user_file uf ON file.file_id = uf.file_id INNER JOIN picture_tag pt ON file.file_id = pt.file_id
AND pt.tag_name = #{tagName}
LEFT JOIN video_meta_data ON file.file_id = video_meta_data.file_id
uf.is_deleted = #{isDeleted} AND uf.user_id = #{userId}
AND file.category = 'image' AND file.content_type != 'image/gif'
AND file.content_type = 'image/gif'
AND file.category = 'video'
GROUP BY uf.user_id, file.file_id, group_date
GROUP BY uf.user_id, file.file_id
ORDER BY
${orderKeyword} ${orderType}
${orderKeyword} DESC

SELECT f.* FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 AND f.file_id IN
#{fileId}

SELECT f.*, uf.upload_time, img.*, video.*, img.file_id AS img_file_id, video.file_id AS video_file_id FROM file f LEFT JOIN image_meta_data img ON f.file_id = img.file_id LEFT JOIN video_meta_data video ON f.file_id = video.file_id INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE f.file_id = #{fileId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 AND uf.user_id = #{userId} limit 1

SELECT CASE WHEN size BETWEEN 0 AND 102400 THEN '0-100KB' WHEN size BETWEEN 102401 AND 1048576 THEN '100KB-1MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 1048577 AND 10485760 THEN '1MB-10MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 10485761 AND 52428800 THEN '10MB-50MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 52428801 AND 104857600 THEN '50MB-100MB' ELSE '100MB+' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY CASE WHEN size BETWEEN 0 AND 102400 THEN '0-100KB' WHEN size BETWEEN 102401 AND 1048576 THEN '100KB-1MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 1048577 AND 10485760 THEN '1MB-10MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 10485761 AND 52428800 THEN '10MB-50MB' WHEN size BETWEEN 52428801 AND 104857600 THEN '50MB-100MB' ELSE '100MB+' END ORDER BY MIN(size)

SELECT CASE WHEN content_type = 'image/png' THEN 'image/png' WHEN content_type IN ('image/jpeg', 'image/jpg', 'image/pjpeg') THEN 'image/jpeg' WHEN content_type = 'image/gif' THEN 'image/gif' WHEN content_type = 'image/bmp' THEN 'image/bmp' WHEN content_type = 'video/mp4' THEN 'video/mp4' WHEN content_type = 'video/rmvb' THEN 'video/rmvb' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-matroska' THEN 'video/x-matroska' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-ms-wmv' THEN 'video/x-ms-wmv' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-flv' THEN 'video/x-flv' ELSE '其他' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY CASE WHEN content_type = 'image/png' THEN 'image/png' WHEN content_type IN ('image/jpeg', 'image/jpg', 'image/pjpeg') THEN 'image/jpeg' WHEN content_type = 'image/gif' THEN 'image/gif' WHEN content_type = 'image/bmp' THEN 'image/bmp' WHEN content_type = 'video/mp4' THEN 'video/mp4' WHEN content_type = 'video/rmvb' THEN 'video/rmvb' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-matroska' THEN 'video/x-matroska' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-ms-wmv' THEN 'video/x-ms-wmv' WHEN content_type = 'video/x-flv' THEN 'video/x-flv' ELSE '其他' END HAVING name != '其他' ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN f.category = 'image' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS imageCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.category = 'video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS videoCount FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 AND f.category IN ('image', 'video')
